rumor_about_them: People say Oryk Sarnok is Known locally through day-to-day work as public safety steward. and rarely acts without a second motive.

social_texture: Oryk Sarnok speaks like someone who has spent too long translating private stakes into acceptable public language. Around Duneshade Outpost, people read them as quota-aware, contribution-minded, and never fully off the clock.
money_pressure: Their material pressure is tied to production; even when wealthy, they think in terms of loss, leverage, and what one bad week would expose.
status_anxiety: What they fear most is not simple failure but work shortfalls becoming socially visible before they can contain it.
long_memory: They remember who made their work harder, who preserved dignity under strain, and who tried to force speed without bearing consequence.
obvious_tell: When pressure rises, Oryk touches clothing, tools, or insignia before answering, as if checking that their role is still intact.
best_use_case: Use Oryk Sarnok when the party needs a socially grounded face for Duneshade Outpost: access, warning, delay, price, or reluctant help.
private_contradiction: They want to appear consistent, but their real choices are split between duty, self-protection, and preserving one relationship they cannot afford to lose.
